impact: This advances checkbox-204 by proving the daemon recovery path skips the blocked PP&D task set and produces exactly one unchecked daemon-repair task when the board is otherwise blocked and status is stale.
summary: Add a focused daemon unittest for blocked-only stale calling_llm repair selection.
target_task: Task checkbox-204: Add one parser-clean daemon unittest proving that a blocked-only board with stale `calling_llm` status appends or selects exactly one unchecked daemon-repair task and does not select checkbox-178, checkbox-182, checkbox-186, checkbox-187, checkbox-191, checkbox-193, checkbox-194, checkbox-195, checkbox-197, checkbox-198, or checkbox-203.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
